title: SpectraCam
description: A surveillance camera system that you can control through a control panel.
body: his system adds security cameras that you can link to a control panel. From there, you can view each camera one by one and move using the WASD keys, exploring the area as if you were inside the camera. You can also switch between cameras using Control plus A or D, without leaving the interface. Everything works smoothly and simply, designed to help you explore and monitor different parts of the map.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gGOqaCUQIJk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
